## Summary

Describe the repository improvement in one short paragraph.

## Type of change

- documentation
- skill update
- experiment note
- template addition
- security or hygiene improvement
- repository metadata support

## Evidence level

- code-confirmed
- doc-confirmed
- artifact-confirmed
- experiment-confirmed
- analogy-based
- unresolved

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant artifact paths or upstream code paths were checked
- [ ] Any experiment claims include enough run context to reproduce
- [ ] No local-only research notes or private run data were committed

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets are included
- [ ] No private source material is included
- [ ] Any logs or examples were redacted where needed
